evidence: Yuki: For your information, Yukimura san told me that in the case that a rope top gets a little bored with his rope bottom, the rope bottom senses it much earlier than the rope top realizes it. So he told us that it is always the rope bottom that will lose the feeling of connection first. Such a digression might be special to a private lesson, and it was fun.
expected_question: According to Yukimura san, who loses the feeling of connection first when a rope top gets bored?
reason: This lesson anecdote generalizes which partner will detect lost connection first, without yielding dependable or actionable rope guidance.
